title: Amruteshwar Temple
tagline: Amruteshwar Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Amruteshwar Temple is an intricately carved Shiva temple in Ratanwadi.
overview.description: Amruteshwar Temple is an intricately carved Shiva temple in Ratanwadi. It is over 1200 years old and was built by the rulers of Shilahara dynasty in the 9th century CE. This is one of twelve Shiva temples built by King Jhanjha. It measures 61mX36m and is surrounded by a low parapet with an entrance towards the east. On plan it consists of the mandapa, with an antarala and garbhagriha on the east of it, and a porch before the eastern back door of the shrine.

topPlaces.name: Ratanwadi
topPlaces.description: Ratanwadi is a village in Ahmednagar district, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhandardara
topPlaces.description: Bhandardara is a holiday resort village on the Pravara River near Igatpuri, in the Western Ghats of India. The village is located in the Akole tehsil, Aahilyanagar district of the state of Maharashtra, about 185 kilometers (115 mi) from Mumbai, and 73 kilometers (45 mi) from Nashik.

topPlaces.name: Ratangad
topPlaces.description: Ratangad is a fort in Ratanwadi, Maharashtra, India, overlooking Bhandardara in the Ahmadnagar district of Maharashtra bordering the Thane district. The fort is about 400 years old.

topPlaces.name: Ghanchakkar
topPlaces.description: Ghanchakkar 1,532 metres (5,026 ft) is the third highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadri mountain ranges in western India. Its neighbouring peak Muda 1,520 metres (4,990 ft) is the fourth highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadris.

topPlaces.name: Ghatghar Dam
topPlaces.description: Ghatghar Dam refers to two associated gravity dams built using roller-compacted concrete, the first use in India. They are situated in Ghatghar village, in Ahmednagar district Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Kalsubai
topPlaces.description: Kalsubai is a mountain in the Western Ghats, located in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kalsubai is the highest peak in Maharashtra and is located in Ahilyanagar district in Akole Taluka.

items.note: Ratanwadi is a village in Ahmednagar district, Maharashtra, India.

Bhandardara is a holiday resort village on the Pravara River near Igatpuri, in the Western Ghats of India. The village is located in the Akole tehsil, Aahilyanagar district of the state of Maharashtra, about 185 kilometers (115 mi) from Mumbai, and 73 kilometers (45 mi) from Nashik.
Ratangad is a fort in Ratanwadi, Maharashtra, India, overlooking Bhandardara in the Ahmadnagar district of Maharashtra bordering the Thane district. The fort is about 400 years old.

Ghanchakkar 1,532 metres (5,026 ft) is the third highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadri mountain ranges in western India. Its neighbouring peak Muda 1,520 metres (4,990 ft) is the fourth highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadris.
Ghatghar Dam refers to two associated gravity dams built using roller-compacted concrete, the first use in India. They are situated in Ghatghar village, in Ahmednagar district Maharashtra, India.
Kalsubai is a mountain in the Western Ghats, located in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kalsubai is the highest peak in Maharashtra and is located in Ahilyanagar district in Akole Taluka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Amruteshwar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Amruteshwar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Amruteshwar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Amruteshwar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Amruteshwar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Amruteshwar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Amruteshwar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Amruteshwar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ratanwadi, Bhandardara, Ratangad, Ghanchakkar, Ghatghar Dam.
